title: hieracium jurassicum subsp. pseudohemiplecum
intro: Hieracium jurassicum subsp. pseudohemiplecum, also known as a species of hawkweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium jurassicum subsp. pseudohemiplecum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
